data.title: FFW Corporation (OTC: FFWC) reports earnings for fiscal year ended June 30, 2025; stock at $41.00 on 8/22/25.
data.description: WABASH, IN - On August 25, 2025, FFW Corporation, the parent company of Crossroads Bank, disclosed their fiscal year ended on June 30, 2025. Traded under OTC PINK: FFWC, their stock closed at $41.00 on 8/22/25.

data.title: NielsenIQ (NIQ) extends strategic agreement with Sally Beauty, providing key account trade area data and consumer insights.
data.description: NielsenIQ (NIQ) (NYSE: NIQ), a prominent consumer intelligence company, has declared an extended and upgraded partnership with Sally Beauty, a top specialty beauty retailer and distributor of professional-grade beauty items. Under this multi-year deal, NIQ will remain the exclusive supplier of essential account trade area data for brand allies of Sally Beauty, and will also persist as the primary provider of consumer insights for Sally Beauty using their panel.

data.title: North America Athletic Wear Market to reach US$ 48.63 billion by 2033, growing at 7.48% rate, driven by health awareness and sustainability.
data.description: Dublin - The latest report titled "North America Athletic Wear Market Size and Share Analysis - Growth Trends and Forecast Report 2025-2033" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. In 2024, the North America Athletic Wear Market reached a value of US$ 25.44 billion. It is projected to grow at a rate of 7.48% from 2025 to 2033, with an estimated market value of US$ 48.63 billion by 2033. This growth can be attributed to the increasing health awareness, rising participation in sports and exercise activities, and the rising demand for athletic wear.

data.title: Luvme Hair launches all-in-one wig tutorial for easy styling with diverse styles and summer savings.
data.description: Leading beauty company Luvme Hair has recently introduced a comprehensive line of wig solutions, featuring a wide range of styles and exclusive summer discounts. The New York-based company, renowned for their high-quality human hair lace wigs and extensions, has launched an all-inclusive wig collection aiming to provide customers with effortless beauty options. The product line includes a diverse selection of styles to cater to various preferences, while also offering irresistible savings for the summer season. This move by Luvme Hair aligns with their commitment to offering premium beauty solutions to customers.

data.title: Study by AccessibilityChecker.Org shows accessible websites rank higher in search results; analysis of 10,000 sites.
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware on August 25th, 2025, a recent report titled "The Impact of Website Accessibility on Search Engine Ranking: 2025 SEO Analysis" was released by the organization AccessibilityChecker.Org in collaboration with Semrush. Their examination of 10,000 websites indicated a noticeable pattern: websites that prioritize accessibility tend to rank higher in search engine results.

data.title: Disneyland Resort marks 70 years with 70 Happiest Hours initiative in Anaheim, involving community celebrations over 70 hours.
data.description: In Anaheim, California, on August 25, 2025, Disneyland Resort marked its 70th anniversary by hosting a community event. The celebration included 70 hours of fun-filled activities and surprises, inviting local residents to join in commemorating The Happiest Place on Earth.

data.title: Inventor from Brandon, MB creates the ULTIMATE CHAIR for comfort at outdoor events and activities. (TRO-1408)
data.description: In Pittsburgh on August 25, 2025, an inventor from Brandon, Manitoba, Canada, shared his inspiration behind creating a new outdoor chair for increased comfort during outdoor sporting events. The inventor introduced the ULTIMATE CHAIR, crafted to provide enhanced comfort for users. The new design aimed to revolutionize outdoor seating experiences with innovative features.

data.title: Freedom Plaza & NY Council on Problem Gambling partner to establish problem gambling resource center in NYC venue.
data.description: A new entertainment and gaming venue named Freedom Plaza is set to be developed in NYC, spearheaded by Soloviev Group and Mohegan. This project will feature a specialized center aimed at assisting individuals impacted by problem gambling. The announcement was made in New York on August 25, 2025, through a press release.

data.title: Palmer Holland partners with Knowde to launch new product knowledge platform using AI technology, enhancing customer connections.
data.description: On August 25, 2025, in Cleveland, Palmer Holland, a prominent distributor in North America specializing in various products, unveiled a cutting-edge product knowledge platform utilizing AI technology developed by Knowde. This release represents a notable progression in the company's continuous efforts to establish connections and facilitate access to information.

data.title: Metacon repaid SEK 20 million project financing and received EUR 14.9 million customer payment, completing contractual obligations.
data.description: On August 25, 2025, in Stockholm, Metacon fulfilled its repayment commitment by returning the temporary project funding of SEK 20 million acquired in May. The company also received a scheduled payment from a customer on August 22, totaling EUR 14.9 million. With these transactions, Metacon successfully settled its contractual obligations.

data.title: PHFA issues RFP for mixed-use development projects with priority for third-class cities; seeks new construction or rehab proposals.
data.description: HARRISBURG, Pa., August 25, 2025 - The Pennsylvania Housing Finance Agency has announced that funding preference will be given to proposals from third-class cities. The agency is currently accepting proposals for new construction or rehabilitation of mixed-use projects, with a focus on providing financial support. Interested parties can submit their proposals in response to the Request for Proposals.
